page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Motif prediction pipeline and various motif-related tools
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Motif prediction pipeline and various motif-related tools
page_metadata.biotools__summary: GimmeMotifs is a de novo motif prediction pipeline, especially suited for ChIP-seq datasets. It incorporates several existing motif prediction algorithms in an ensemble method to predict motifs and clusters these motifs using the WIC similarity scoring metric.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: GimmeMotifs is a de novo motif prediction pipeline, especially suited for ChIP-seq datasets. It incorporates several existing motif prediction algorithms in an ensemble method to predict motifs and clusters these motifs using the WIC similarity scoring metric.
